p pbar : Pose
ε : ℝ
poly : GoodPoly
pc : GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition poly pbar ε
P : Euc(3)
⊢ GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer pbar ε poly P pc p.outerParams * ‖P‖ =
    inner ℝ (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.w poly pbar ε pc) (p.outer P)
